title: Update Data Retention Policy - delete personal data after 90 days
description: Per the recent compliance directive, we are required to update our Data Retention Policy to enforce that we delete personal data after 90 days of account closure, instead of retaining data for 12 months. Please update the knowledge base article KB-POLICY-011 (Data Retention Policy) to reflect this change. The exact requirement is that personal data must be deleted after 90 days. This is critical for upcoming audit.

title: Review access controls for HR database
description: Need to audit current access permissions on the HR database after recent role changes. Ensure only authorized personnel have read access. Schedule review with DBA team.

title: Policy review for GDPR consent forms
description: Review and update GDPR consent form templates to align with new EU guidelines. Completed and forms are now live.
